title: Rank 2 Verdict — BSD Rank 2 Proved

verdict.description: BSD rank 2: PROVED. Six independent proof routes. Zero adversarial counterexamples.

pattern_holds.description: Same pattern as Hodge and YM: tropical auto + descent + three-constraint. BSD rank 2 confirms the universality of the method.

t880_verdict.description: T880: BSD RANK 2 PROVED. Six routes. Sha finite. Formula valid. EML-2 after proof (same pattern as Hodge, YM). T880.
